rootCause.competingOwners: client-insurer-operational-directory-owner rewrites portal and bank rows even when the canonical module is in edit mode.
rootCause.snapshotContractMismatch: client-insurer-edit-owner removes data-cuso while modules/aseguradoras.js still dereferences it.
rootCause.fakeAccountCreation: The add-account handler creates a random masked placeholder.
rootCause.currentTabNotCommitted: guardarDraft does not force the current tab snapshot.
rootCause.injectedUsernameNotWired: Username is injected after canonical wiring.
rootCause.credentialMutationBlocked: Password editing was prohibited instead of routed to the secure provider.
rootCause.writeAcknowledgementMissing: The optimistic LAB store closes editing without waiting for write acknowledgement.
rootCause.autoadministrationGap: Mutable tenant configuration still exists in static JavaScript and must move to configuracion_catalogo before production.

workPlanPriority.productionGate: All listed modules must be operational, persistent, role-correct and dynamically configurable before production authorization.
workPlanPriority.tariffKnowledge: Preserve mapped evidence now; integrate and expose it per insurer with Cotizador/Comparativo without blocking the operational directory repair.

nextAllowedStep: Execute one no-write diagnostic that reapplies the deterministic transform in the ephemeral runner, captures every transformed source plus the exact node --check and validator outputs, and uploads sanitized evidence. Do not commit, push, read data, deploy or open a browser.
